notes: There seems to be an issue with the menu on NVIDIA GPUs, where it either doesn't boot at all, or, as in my case, it lags and freezes so much that you can't get past the menu. I've tried pretty much everything I could think of; opting into the test branch, switching drivers, switching GPUs, booting from file instead of steam, turning off my internet, booting with proton, but nothing has yet worked.
Previous issues fixed with an install of NixOS.
